recommendations.title: Cha Cha Real Smooth
recommendations.overview: Fresh out of college and stuck at his New Jersey home without a clear path forward, 22-year-old Andrew begins working as a party starter for bar/bat mitzvahs—where he strikes up a unique friendship with a young mom and her teenage daughter.

recommendations.title: Love Hurts
recommendations.overview: Family and friends try to sabotage the budding romance between a young upper class girl and a humble student.

recommendations.title: Eyes Wide Shut
recommendations.overview: After Dr. Bill Harford's wife, Alice, admits to having sexual fantasies about a man she met, Bill becomes obsessed with having a sexual encounter. He discovers an underground sexual group and attends one of their meetings -- and quickly discovers tha

recommendations.title: Monsieur Ibrahim
recommendations.overview: Paris, 1960s. Momo, a resolute and independent Jewish teenager who lives with his father, a sullen and depressed man, in a working-class neighborhood, develops a close friendship with Monsieur Ibrahim, an elderly Muslim who owns a small grocery store

recommendations.title: Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: 1984, Sandusky, Ohio. A naive 17-year-old navigates heartbreak and self-expression as he explores his sexuality.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Nymphomaniac
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of a middle-class French girl's sexual adventures, her then fall into prostitution, and her ultimate redemption.

recommendations.title: Tell Me Who I Am
recommendations.overview: In this documentary, Alex trusts his twin, Marcus, to tell him about his past after he loses his memory. But Marcus is hiding a dark family secret.

recommendations.title: Towelhead
recommendations.overview: A young Arab-American girl struggles with her sexual obsession, a bigoted Army reservist, and her strict father during the Gulf War.

recommendations.title: Sexual Chronicles of a French Family
recommendations.overview: Three generations of a French family open up about their sexual experiences and desires after young Romain is caught masturbating in his biology class.

recommendations.title: Bomb City
recommendations.overview: An ongoing feud between punk rockers and a more affluent clique in a small Texas town leads to a hate crime.
